Build-Depends: debhelper-compat (= 13), bison, flex, gawk, gcc-bpf (>= 14.2), valgrind, binutils-dev (>= 2.44), login.defs, libbpf-dev (>= 1.5), libc-dev (>= 2.34), libelf-dev, libfuse3-dev, libpcap-dev, libpfm4-dev, libsystemd-dev, libz-dev, libsframe-dev, libiberty-dev
Package-List: dtrace deb utils optional arch=amd64,arm64 dtrace-tests deb utils optional arch=amd64,arm64 libdtrace2 deb utils optional arch=amd64,arm64 libdtrace2-dev deb utils optional arch=amd64,arm64
